> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add denoland/skills --skill deno-expert -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/deno-expert`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/deno-expert.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add denoland/skills --skill deno-expert -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Expert-level Deno knowledge for code review, debugging, and best practice enforcement in modern Deno (JSR imports, Fresh frontend, Deno Deploy, sandboxing). Enforces JSR over deno.land/x, built-in fmt/lint/test, island architecture.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add denoland/skills --skill deno-expert -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`; status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[denoland/skills](https://github.com/denoland/skills) (official Deno team)

## Comparable Alternatives

General Deno guidance or other runtime-specific expert skills (e.g. node-expert equivalents); `deno-guidance` sibling skill.

&gt; Evidence synthesized from public web sources (GitHub repos, official docs, skill registries); confidence reflects source reputation and public signals only. Not an endorsement.
